backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages travel inquiries in a map, exposing submitInquiry and getAllInquiries methods with timestamp-based IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that real contact details (phone 7006946979, email arsalandezayker@gmail.com) have been applied across FloatingActionButtons, Footer, Navbar, and Contact page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn/ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the AtoN Travels React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with seven routes (Home, About, Services, Packages, Contact, Gallery, Testimonials) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/FloatingActionBu: Fixed bottom-right floating buttons providing quick WhatsApp (wa.me/917006946979) and Call Now (tel:+917006946979) actions on every page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand info, quick links, services list, and real contact details (7006946979 / arsalandezayker@gmail.com) plus social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component composing Navbar, main content slot, Footer, and FloatingActionButtons for consistent page structure.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: Full-screen image lightbox modal supporting keyboard navigation (ESC/arrows), prev/next buttons, image counter, and click-outside-to-close.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive, scroll-aware navigation bar with AtoN Travels branding, desktop/mobile nav links, and WhatsApp/Call Now CTA buttons linked to 7006946979.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsPrev: Renders a preview section of three hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, reviewer info, and a link to the full testimonials page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitInquiry mutation hook that sends a travel inquiry form to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the inquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a custom Kashmir-themed color palette (teal, amber, offwhite), and defines reusable utility classes for typography, buttons, and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: About Us page displaying the company story, trust indicators, a why-choose-us list, and a team photo with a call-to-action linking to the contact page.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a travel inquiry form that submits data to the ICP backend via useSubmitInquiry, plus quick-contact buttons for phone and WhatsApp.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Displays a filterable photo gallery of Jammu & Kashmir images organized by category (Kashmir, Ladakh, Culture, Pilgrimage) with a lightbox component for full-screen viewing and prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage featuring a hero section with background image, stats, featured services cards, featured tour package previews, and a testimonials preview component.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page listing five offerings (Tour Packages, Taxi & Transport, Hotel Bookings, Flight Bookings, Custom Travel Planning) with descriptions, feature lists, and styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Full testimonials page rendering seven customer reviews with star ratings, trip details, and avatar initials, plus a star rating helper component.
frontend/src/pages/TourPackages.tsx: Tour packages listing page displaying six packages (Kashmir Valley, Leh Ladakh, Vaishno Devi, All India, Honeymoon, Gulmarg Winter) with images, pricing, ratings, highlights, and links to contact.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the AtoN Travels frontend, extending the default theme with custom brand colors (teal, amber, offwhite), fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 5) for the AtoN Travels website, documenting architectural notes, existing implemented features across all 7 pages, known issues, and metadata about the multi-page React frontend build.
